subcodes.first_line: O Sakinih! Thy letter hath reached the Most Holy Court, and the glance of loving-kindness hath been directed towards it. Praise be to God that through the outpourings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سکینه مکتوبت بساحت احدیه وارد و طرف عنایت بان متوجه لله الحمد که از فیوضات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
